sources.title: Maa Tujhhe Salaam 2002 Dv DRip X 264 AC 3 Team DDH~ RG

metadata.Plot: Major Pratab Singh works in the Indian army and he and his battalion has been assigned duty near the Indo-Pakistan border. There duty mainly consists of eliminating any terrorists trying to cross the Indian border. A Pakistan leader Gul Mustan and well known Lala is plotting to liberate Kashmir from India so that they can take control in there own way but things does not go accordingly as one loyalist of Lala; Albaksh begins to leak important information about there plans to the Indian army. And thus there begins a saga of combat between the army and the terrorists leaving many casualties on both sides.
